'''Capital Season''',<ref name="LE" /> also known as the '''Procopian Season''',<ref name="ES">{{WEGCite|story=The Event of the Season|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}}</ref> was a holiday celebrated by the [[Tapani Noble Houses|nobility]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Every year between [[Expansion Week]] and [[Shelova Week]], the upper class would gather on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] to mingle and spy on each other. If a noble was to not be in attendance, their economic, social, and political status would suffer.<ref name="LE" />

{{Stub}}
